crown_of_the_lean_to.name: Crown (lean-to treasure)
crown_of_the_lean_to.description: A valuable crown recovered from the lean-to west of the Bramblewood after killing the troll

acquired.from: Troll's hoard, lean-to west of Bramblewood
acquired.location: Lean-to west of the Bramblewood, NW of Tagmira

crown_of_the_lean_to.dm_notes: Part of troll hoard. Value not yet assessed in-game. May have a history worth developing.

jewels_lean_to.name: Jewels (lean-to treasure)
jewels_lean_to.description: A collection of jewels recovered from the lean-to west of the Bramblewood after killing the troll

acquired.from: Troll's hoard, lean-to west of Bramblewood
acquired.location: Lean-to west of the Bramblewood, NW of Tagmira

jewels_lean_to.dm_notes: Part of troll hoard. Composition and individual values unspecified.

bramblewood_loot_s5.name: Bramblewood loot (session 5)
bramblewood_loot_s5.description: Unspecified loot taken from the Bramblewood during the party's early exploration
bramblewood_loot_s5.dm_notes: Listed in session 5 as 'loot (unspecified)'. Needs clarification — what was it, and does the party still have it?

obsidian_glyph_slab.name: Obsidian Glyph Slab
obsidian_glyph_slab.description: An obsidian slab covered in glyphs, carried by the orc Brat-Kho; associated with a booming voice effect
properties: Produces a booming voice when used
obsidian_glyph_slab.dm_notes: Held by Brat-Kho, a leader of the Bronze Host. Potential loot if the party defeats him.

spell_stealing_plaque.name: Spell-Stealing Plaque
spell_stealing_plaque.description: A plaque carried by Mollgarn the Unfailing; capable of stealing spells
spell_stealing_plaque.holder: Mollgarn the Unfailing (Bronze Host orc leader)

acquired.from: Mollgarn the Unfailing (Bronze Host orc leader)

spell_stealing_plaque.dm_notes: Held by Mollgarn the Unfailing, a leader of the Bronze Host. Potential loot if the party defeats him.

silver_wrapped_fingerbone.name: Silver-Wrapped Fingerbone
silver_wrapped_fingerbone.description: A fingerbone wrapped in silver, carried by Ulzhar Bone-Tongue; associated with a command spell
silver_wrapped_fingerbone.dm_notes: Held by Ulzhar Bone-Tongue, a leader of the Bronze Host. Potential loot if the party defeats him.
